zh.Pickwell, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Cave I於1590年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾時，他的父親John Francis Cave20歲，母親Magdalena Armyne16歲。他於大約1615年與Rachel Kellogg在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1851年住在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯伯丁且於1911年住在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。他去世於1657年1月17日在英國英格蘭享年67歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Cave I于1590年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾时，他的父亲John Francis Cave20岁，母亲Magdalena Armyne16岁。他于大约1615年与Rachel Kellogg在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1851年住在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯伯丁且于1911年住在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。他去世于1657年1月17日在英国英格兰享年67岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Cave I was born in 1590, in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Francis Cave, was 20 and his mother, Magdalena Armyne, was 16. He married Rachel Kellogg about 1615, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom in 1851 and Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom in 1911. He died on 17 January 1657, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Cave I est né en 1590, à Pickwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Francis Cave, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Magdalena Armyne, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Rachel Kellogg environ 1615, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Spalding, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1851 et à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1911. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1657, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Cave I 1590 in Pickwell, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Francis Cave 20 und seine Mutter Magdalena Armyne 16. Er hat um 1615 in England Rachel Kellogg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1851 hat er in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und 1911 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 17. Januar 1657 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Cave I è nato il nel 1590 nel Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Francis Cave, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Magdalena Armyne, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Rachel Kellogg circa 1615, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1851 e nel Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1911. Morì il 17 gennaio 1657, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicestershire, England.

ja.Pickwell, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Cave Iが1590年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアピックウエルで生まれた時，父John Francis Caveは20歳，母Magdalena Armyneは16歳であった。約1615年にイギリスでRachel Kelloggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1851年にはイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスプアルディングに，1911年にはイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターに住んでいた。彼は1657年1月17日にイギリスイギリスで67歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Cave I(이)가 1590년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 피ck웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Francis Cave(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdalena Armyne(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1615년 영국에서 Rachel Kellogg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1851년도에 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스팔딩에서, 1911년도에 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 살았다. 그는 1657년 1월 17일 영국 잉글랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Cave I nasceu em 1590, em Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Francis Cave, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Magdalena Armyne, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachel Kellogg aproximadamente 1615, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1851 e em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1911. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1657, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Cave I родился в 1590 г. в местности пикквелл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Francis Cave было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalena Armyne, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel Kellogg около 1615 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности спалдинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1851 году и в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в 1911 году. Он умер 17 января 1657 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Cave I nació en 1590, en Pickwell, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Francis Cave, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Magdalena Armyne, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Rachel Kellogg aproximadamente 1615, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1851 y en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1911. Murió el 17 de enero de 1657, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
